description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:18.06.1-ce image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a "build docker images" job that runs the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/jorgemurta/docker-for-laravel -f docker/application/Dockerfile ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/jorgemurta/docker-for-laravel. Also in the build stage add a "docker info" job that runs docker info. In the test stage add a "unit tests" job that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/jorgemurta/docker-for-laravel and runs vendor/bin/phpunit.
